hero.headline: We haul it *all* — no exceptions
hero.subheadline: One call gets that old shelter, broken furniture, or pile of stuff gone for good.

services_section.label: WHAT WE HAUL
services_section.heading: No item too big, no pile too messy
services_section.subheading: From single items to full cleanouts

services.title: Furniture Removal
services.description: Old couches, mattresses, tables, chairs — we'll load it and haul it.

services.title: Construction Debris
services.description: Demo waste, old shingles, lumber, and building materials cleared out.

services.title: Appliance Pickup
services.description: Refrigerators, washers, dryers, and other heavy appliances removed safely.

services.title: Full Property Cleanouts
services.description: Garages, basements, attics, or entire properties cleared efficiently.

about.heading: Florence junk removal that shows up
about.body: We're the team your neighbors call when stuff needs to go. Heavy lifting, tight spaces, weird items — we handle it.

reviews.name: Laura H.
reviews.text: Great guys, super accommodating and responsive! Will definitely contact them again.

reviews.name: Jody M.
reviews.text: Josh hauled off heavy items that were too much for us. Good people in the Pee Dee area.

reviews.name: Terri M.
reviews.text: Amazing job removing an old shelter. Quick, efficient, and very professional.

cta.heading: Ready to clear that space?
cta.body: One call, one crew, one bill. We show up when we say we will and haul whatever needs to go.
